positive: A stylized, geometric illustration featuring a group of abstract constellations and celestial bodies forming a cosmic woodland forest. The trees are composed of swirling nebula gas and glowing crystalline structures, with pathways traced by glowing starlight. The palette should be deep indigo, sapphire blue, ethereal cyan, contrasted by brilliant gold and silver highlights. The overall style is neo-art nouveau mixed with modern psychedelic pop art. Composition should be circular and centered, with clean, strong silhouettes for easy apparel printing. Focus on deep contrast and graphic impact. High detail, vector illustration style, crisp lines, suitable for screen printing.
negative: blur, noise, grain, low resolution, text, watermark, logo, letters, words, bad anatomy, extra limbs, ugly, distorted, messy, jpeg artifacts, signature
